title: Halloween Mashup Pack Music only.
description: Replaces the vanilla soundtrack with the Halloween Mashup pack soundtrack. Just that.
body:
This pack replaces all the vanilla soundtrack with the Halloween Mashup pack soundtrack. It doesn't add any textures from the Mashup pack, just the songs.

The soundtrack in question:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kmy8q6YWqH8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kmy8q6YWqH8)
